title: pityopsis graminifolia var. tracyi
intro: Pityopsis graminifolia var. tracyi, also known as Tracy's silvery aster or silvery aster, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pityopsis graminifolia var. tracyi include its potential to soothe sore throats, calm skin irritations, and ease respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Pityopsis graminifolia var. tracyi is often used as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is used to create topical salves and creams.
